message:
fix: align gt shutdown kill order with gt down (gt-cqytb)

killSessionsInOrder previously killed Deacon first, then everything
else, then Mayor last. This was inconsistent with gt down which stops
services in order: polecats, refineries, witnesses, then town sessions
(Mayor, Boot, Deacon).

The old ordering caused race conditions where witnesses could restart
polecats being killed, and Boot could restart Deacon after it was
stopped.

New order: polecats/crew → refineries → witnesses → Mayor → Boot →
Deacon, matching gt down and TownSessions() ordering.
